title: Nextera DNA Flex NGS Library Prep: Cleanup Libraries
author: Opentrons
materials: Upload your protocol into the OT App.

steps.title: SPB (user is prompted to vortex...
steps.instruction: SPB (user is prompted to vortex before adding mid-protocol) * channel

steps.title: Input the type and mount sides...
steps.instruction: Input the type and mount sides for your P50 and P300 pipettes, the DNA type, and the number of samples to process.

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
